name: Baby items
description:
A family of five has recently welcomed a baby boy, but the father's income has dropped significantly while on paternity leave as he cannot work overtime. As the sole breadwinner, this reduction in income is straining their budget just when newborn expenses are highest. We're seeking donors to sponsor 3 months of diapers, wet wipes and milk powder to help this family through this transitional period.

Diapers: Drypers SuperDry Premium Tape Baby Diaper S size - 66 pc x 5 https://sg.shp.ee/M4eZDGYY

Wet Wipes: BELLO Baby Wipes no caps - 10 packs x 5 https://sg.shp.ee/Jpk4MZc8

Milk Powder: GROW Infant Milk Formula for Babies Stage 1 (0-12 months) 900g – 6 tins https://sg.shp.ee/Swda2HGg

passiton.name: Various baby items to bless
passiton.description:
Items to bless: 
1. 3 pairs of brand new nursing bras (L size) 
2. 1 foldable baby mat 
3. 1 bathing net to attach to bathtub
4. toys and book for baby
5. 1 breastfeeding book and nursing cover 
6. opened pack of diapers M size (brand moko moko) 
7. 2 x waterproof mats (used once only) 
8. 1x  medela breast pump and power charger only.
9. 1 x feeding bib 
10. Breast milk storage bags 
11. Jevon baby brand disposable Breast pads x 1 pack

description: Family's fan currently has a faulty cover. While it is taped on, we are concerned of the risk of it coming apart especially with many young children. Due to financial constraints, we hope for a donation of it.

name: Bicycle
description:
The family is seeking assistance to obtain a second-hand bicycle for their 13-year-old son, who requires a reliable way to travel to school. He is approximately 1.6–1.7m tall, and a suitably sized bicycle is important for his safety and comfort.

With a household income of $1.9k, the family prioritises essential expenses and is unable to afford a bicycle. 

A second-hand bicycle would provide him with a practical and independent means of commuting and support his school attendance.

name: Wheelchair
description:
85 year old elderly lady requires a wheelchair as her current one is spoilt. She has knee issues and uses a wheelchair to move around at home. She lives together with her husband who is terminally ill and fully bedbound.

Appreciate if donor can deliver (they live in Toa Payoh). Donor may contact me on Whatsapp at 97274215.
